对出生率、死亡率、自然增长率拟合模型并预测

2026-05-25

library(aTSA)
## 
## Attaching package: 'aTSA'
## The following object is masked from 'package:graphics':
## 
##     identify
library(forecast)
## 
## Attaching package: 'forecast'
## The following object is masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     forecast
library(tseries)
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod':
##   method            from
##   as.zoo.data.frame zoo
## 
## Attaching package: 'tseries'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     adf.test, kpss.test, pp.test
data <- read.table(text = "
年份 出生率 死亡率 自然增长率
1980 18.21 6.34 11.87
1981 20.91 6.36 14.55
1982 22.28 6.6 15.68
1983 20.19 6.9 13.29
1984 19.9 6.82 13.08
1985 21.04 6.78 14.26
1986 22.43 6.86 15.57
1987 23.33 6.72 16.61
1988 22.37 6.64 15.73
1989 21.58 6.54 15.04
1990 21.06 6.67 14.39
1991 19.68 6.7 12.98
1992 18.24 6.64 11.6
1993 18.09 6.64 11.45
1994 17.7 6.49 11.21
1995 17.12 6.57 10.55
1996 16.98 6.56 10.42
1997 16.57 6.51 10.06
1998 15.64 6.5 9.14
1999 14.64 6.46 8.18
2000 14.03 6.45 7.58
2001 13.38 6.43 6.95
2002 12.86 6.41 6.45
2003 12.41 6.4 6.01
2004 12.29 6.42 5.87
2005 12.4 6.51 5.89
2006 12.09 6.81 5.28
2007 12.1 6.93 5.17
2008 12.14 7.06 5.08
2009 11.95 7.08 4.87
2010 11.9 7.11 4.79
2011 11.93 7.14 4.79
2012 12.1 7.15 4.95
2013 12.08 7.16 4.92
2014 12.37 7.16 5.21
2015 12.07 7.11 4.96
2016 12.95 7.09 5.86
2017 12.45 7.11 5.32
", header = TRUE)

# 把出生率、死亡率、自然增长率转为时间序列对象
birth <- ts(data$出生率, start = 1980, frequency = 1)
death <- ts(data$死亡率, start = 1980, frequency = 1)
growth <- ts(data$自然增长率, start = 1980, frequency = 1)

# 画时间序列图，直观观察趋势
plot(birth, main = "出生率序列(1980-2017)", xlab = "年份", ylab = "出生率(‰)", col = "red", lwd = 2)
lines(lowess(time(birth), birth), col = "blue", lty = 2)  # 趋势线

plot(death, main = "死亡率序列(1980-2017)", xlab = "年份", ylab = "死亡率(‰)", col = "darkgreen", lwd = 2)
lines(lowess(time(death), death), col = "blue", lty = 2)

plot(growth, main = "自然增长率序列(1980-2017)", xlab = "年份", ylab = "自然增长率(‰)", col = "purple", lwd = 2)
lines(lowess(time(growth), growth), col = "blue", lty = 2)

# 6. 平稳性检验：ADF单位根检验
# 原假设：序列存在单位根 → 序列非平稳
# 若p值 < 0.05，则拒绝原假设，认为序列平稳

cat("===== 出生率 ADF检验 =====\n")
## ===== 出生率 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(birth))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  birth
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.3293, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.4446
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 死亡率 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 死亡率 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(death))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  death
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.324, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.4467
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 自然增长率 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 自然增长率 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(growth))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  growth
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.6596, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.3156
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
# （可选）如果序列非平稳，做一阶差分再检验
cat("\n===== 出生率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 出生率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(diff(birth)))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  diff(birth)
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.1797, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.5031
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 死亡率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 死亡率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(diff(death)))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  diff(death)
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.8464, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.2432
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 自然增长率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 自然增长率一阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(diff(growth)))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  diff(growth)
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.3763, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.4265
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
# 二阶差分（对一阶差分结果再差分）
birth_diff2 <- diff(diff(birth))
death_diff2 <- diff(diff(death))
growth_diff2 <- diff(diff(growth))

# 二阶差分的ADF检验
cat("===== 出生率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## ===== 出生率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(birth_diff2))
## Warning in adf.test(birth_diff2): p-value smaller than printed p-value
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  birth_diff2
## Dickey-Fuller = -4.8591, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.01
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 死亡率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 死亡率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(death_diff2))
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  death_diff2
## Dickey-Fuller = -4.0127, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.02038
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
cat("\n===== 自然增长率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====\n")
## 
## ===== 自然增长率二阶差分 ADF检验 =====
print(adf.test(growth_diff2))
## Warning in adf.test(growth_diff2): p-value smaller than printed p-value
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  growth_diff2
## Dickey-Fuller = -5.0847, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.01
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
#一、出生率
# 查看自相关/偏自相关图，定阶
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
acf(birth_diff2, main = "ACF图")
pacf(birth_diff2, main = "PACF图")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
# 手动试几个候选模型，对比AIC
fit1 <- arima(birth_diff2, order = c(1,2,1))  # ARIMA(1,2,1)
fit2 <- arima(birth_diff2, order = c(2,2,1))  # ARIMA(2,2,1)
fit3 <- arima(birth_diff2, order = c(0,2,1))  # ARIMA(0,2,1) 即 IMA(2,1)
# 看哪个AIC/BIC最小
AIC(fit1, fit2, fit3)
##      df      AIC
## fit1  3 119.3748
## fit2  4 116.5512
## fit3  2 123.4485
BIC(fit1, fit2, fit3)
##      df      BIC
## fit1  3 123.9539
## fit2  4 122.6566
## fit3  2 126.5012
# 看残差的ACF/PACF
checkresiduals(fit2)

## 
##  Ljung-Box test
## 
## data:  Residuals from ARIMA(2,2,1)
## Q* = 6.1233, df = 4, p-value = 0.1901
## 
## Model df: 3.   Total lags used: 7
# 或Ljung-Box检验
Box.test(residuals(fit2), lag=10, type="Ljung-Box")
## 
##  Box-Ljung test
## 
## data:  residuals(fit2)
## X-squared = 7.894, df = 10, p-value = 0.6392
# 预测未来10年
forecast_birth <- forecast(fit2, h = 10)
# 查看预测结果
print(forecast_birth)
##      Point Forecast     Lo 80     Hi 80     Lo 95    Hi 95
## 2018     -0.9281427 -2.352525 0.4962398 -3.106548 1.250262
## 2019      0.2883357 -1.291085 1.8677562 -2.127180 2.703851
## 2020     -0.5971682 -2.210864 1.0165278 -3.065103 1.870767
## 2021     -0.7555818 -2.643400 1.1322367 -3.642751 2.131587
## 2022     -0.1392430 -2.212766 1.9342802 -3.310423 3.031937
## 2023     -0.3543854 -2.512327 1.8035565 -3.654673 2.945902
## 2024     -0.5456917 -2.863630 1.7722468 -4.090673 2.999289
## 2025     -0.2856956 -2.768913 2.1975215 -4.083448 3.512057
## 2026     -0.2868095 -2.884103 2.3104841 -4.259027 3.685408
## 2027     -0.3966120 -3.126893 2.3336689 -4.572216 3.778992
# 画预测图
plot(forecast_birth, main = "未来10年出生率预测")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # 恢复默认布局

#二、死亡率
# 查看自相关/偏自相关图，定阶
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
acf(death_diff2, main = "ACF图")
pacf(death_diff2, main = "PACF图")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
# 手动试几个候选模型，对比AIC
fit1 <- arima(death_diff2, order = c(1,2,1))  # ARIMA(1,2,1)
fit2 <- arima(death_diff2, order = c(2,2,1))  # ARIMA(2,2,1)
fit3 <- arima(death_diff2, order = c(0,2,1))  # ARIMA(0,2,1) 即 IMA(2,1)
# 看哪个AIC/BIC最小
AIC(fit1, fit2, fit3)
##      df        AIC
## fit1  3 -15.123964
## fit2  4 -22.744747
## fit3  2  -5.567183
BIC(fit1, fit2, fit3)
##      df        BIC
## fit1  3 -10.544882
## fit2  4 -16.639305
## fit3  2  -2.514462
# 看残差的ACF/PACF
checkresiduals(fit2)

## 
##  Ljung-Box test
## 
## data:  Residuals from ARIMA(2,2,1)
## Q* = 7.9047, df = 4, p-value = 0.09513
## 
## Model df: 3.   Total lags used: 7
# 或Ljung-Box检验
Box.test(residuals(fit2), lag=10, type="Ljung-Box")
## 
##  Box-Ljung test
## 
## data:  residuals(fit2)
## X-squared = 9.6662, df = 10, p-value = 0.4703
# 预测未来10年
forecast_death <- forecast(fit2, h = 10)
# 查看预测结果
print(forecast_death)
##      Point Forecast      Lo 80     Hi 80      Lo 95     Hi 95
## 2018   -0.016210897 -0.1980175 0.1655957 -0.2942601 0.2618383
## 2019    0.028740130 -0.1542458 0.2117261 -0.2511127 0.3085930
## 2020    0.020103076 -0.1746339 0.2148400 -0.2777214 0.3179276
## 2021    0.001315470 -0.2295677 0.2321986 -0.3517898 0.3544208
## 2022    0.023027276 -0.2131124 0.2591669 -0.3381172 0.3841717
## 2023    0.013747676 -0.2385211 0.2660164 -0.3720641 0.3995594
## 2024    0.009096975 -0.2627651 0.2809590 -0.4066801 0.4248741
## 2025    0.018299350 -0.2627772 0.2993759 -0.4115702 0.4481689
## 2026    0.012177075 -0.2847919 0.3091461 -0.4419978 0.4663519
## 2027    0.011943370 -0.2999899 0.3238766 -0.4651174 0.4890042
# 画预测图
plot(forecast_death, main = "未来10年出生率预测")

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))  # 恢复默认布局

#三、自然增长率
# 查看自相关/偏自相关图，定阶
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
acf(growth_diff2, main = "ACF图")
pacf(growth_diff2, main = "PACF图")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))

# 指定差分阶数d=2，自动选p和q
fit <- auto.arima(growth_diff2, d=2, trace=TRUE, stepwise=FALSE, approximation=FALSE)
## 
##  ARIMA(0,2,0)                    : 154.2354
##  ARIMA(0,2,1)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(0,2,2)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(0,2,3)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(0,2,4)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(0,2,5)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(1,2,0)                    : 138.0183
##  ARIMA(1,2,1)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(1,2,2)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(1,2,3)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(1,2,4)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(2,2,0)                    : 130.85
##  ARIMA(2,2,1)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(2,2,2)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(2,2,3)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(3,2,0)                    : 131.6672
##  ARIMA(3,2,1)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(3,2,2)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(4,2,0)                    : 127.2089
##  ARIMA(4,2,1)                    : Inf
##  ARIMA(5,2,0)                    : 127.9897
## 
## 
## 
##  Best model: ARIMA(4,2,0)
summary(fit)
## Series: growth_diff2 
## ARIMA(4,2,0) 
## 
## Coefficients:
##           ar1      ar2      ar3      ar4
##       -1.2413  -1.4328  -0.9598  -0.6400
## s.e.   0.1559   0.2761   0.2628   0.1911
## 
## sigma^2 = 1.756:  log likelihood = -57.53
## AIC=125.07   AICc=127.21   BIC=132.7
## 
## Training set error measures:
##                      ME     RMSE       MAE      MPE     MAPE      MASE
## Training set -0.1023951 1.209553 0.8810186 136.0774 491.4034 0.9835933
##                     ACF1
## Training set -0.03945146
# 残差白噪声检验（确认模型合格）
Box.test(residuals(fit), lag=10, type="Ljung-Box")
## 
##  Box-Ljung test
## 
## data:  residuals(fit)
## X-squared = 17.074, df = 10, p-value = 0.07273
# 预测未来10年
forecast_growth <- forecast(fit, h = 10)
# 查看预测结果
print(forecast_growth)
##      Point Forecast      Lo 80      Hi 80      Lo 95     Hi 95
## 2018     -1.6063339  -3.304388 0.09172053  -4.203284 0.9906163
## 2019     -0.2195434  -2.351019 1.91193199  -3.479354 3.0402669
## 2020     -1.7572259  -4.138631 0.62417938  -5.399271 1.8848192
## 2021     -1.4772258  -4.585941 1.63148914  -6.231595 3.2771434
## 2022     -2.3051143  -6.093413 1.48318390  -8.098816 3.4885878
## 2023     -2.5492005  -7.256443 2.15804230  -9.748307 4.6499061
## 2024     -1.8036148  -7.239507 3.63227772 -10.117095 6.5098654
## 2025     -3.2228789  -9.360490 2.91473250 -12.609546 6.1637877
## 2026     -3.2242359 -10.433857 3.98538495 -14.250400 7.8019277
## 2027     -3.2073636 -11.359285 4.94455740 -15.674651 9.2599237
# 画预测图
plot(forecast_growth, main = "未来10年自然增长率预测")

summary(cars)
##      speed           dist       
##  Min.   : 4.0   Min.   :  2.00  
##  1st Qu.:12.0   1st Qu.: 26.00
